response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable experience with Java/Kotlin, JVM tooling, Spring, or enterprise IDE development, despite listing Java as a skill; their work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile apps, with no evidence of deep JVM internals, build tool integration, or IDE subsystem design as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across multiple languages and platforms
Proven experience in developer tooling and open-source contributions
Excellent communication and workshop leadership in technical communities
concerns: No visible experience with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or enterprise Java frameworks
Lack of demonstrated work on IDE internals, language servers, or JVM-based tooling
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not Java/Kotlin as required
